description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the aergus/latex Docker image. Define two jobs in the default test stage: a presentation job that changes directory to presentation and runs latexmk -lualatex, then stores presentation/predictingdeeper-presentation.pdf as an artifact; and a report job that changes directory to report and runs latexmk -lualatex, then stores report/predictingdeeper-report.pdf as an artifact. No additional services, variables, caches, or rules are needed.
